title: Formspec Posture Declaration
description: Per-deployment posture declaration consumed by WOS admission (ADR-0090 D8). Declares signature policy, jurisdictional posture, and custody requirements for a deployment.

x-lm.intent: Version pin for posture declaration compatibility.

url.description: Canonical URL where this posture declaration is published.

x-lm.intent: Deployment URL for this posture — workflows reference this.

version.description: SemVer of this posture declaration document.

x-lm.intent: Semantic version for pinning posture declarations.

allowedMethods.description: Subset of registered signature-method URIs admitted by this deployment.

x-lm.intent: If a signature method is not in this list, admission emits SignatureAdmissionFailed { reason: method_unsupported }.

minimumPrimitiveVerification.description: Minimum primitive verification status required for admission. verified: cryptographic check must pass. deferredPendingHelper: helper-not-bundled is acceptable.

x-lm.intent: Floor for admission — if adapter returns deferredPendingHelper but posture requires verified, admission fails.

receiptSigningRequired.description: When true, VerificationReceipt MUST carry receiptBytes (signed receipt). When false, unsigned receipts are accepted.

x-lm.intent: If true and receipt lacks receiptBytes, admission emits SignatureAdmissionFailed { reason: posture_floor_unmet }.

allowedSigningIntents.description: Allowlist of signing-intent URIs admitted by this deployment, including deployment-local URIs. Supersedes workflow-level deploymentLocalSigningIntents (PLN-0384 sunset).

x-lm.intent: Deployment-scoped signing-intent allowlist — replaces workflow-level bridge field.

mode.description: Revocation checking policy. strict: must verify and fail on revocation. soft: check but warn. none: skip revocation checks.

notarialRequirements.description: Notarial requirements when framework requires notary involvement.

requiresTrellisExport.description: When true, Trellis export is required for signature custody proof.

requiresUca.description: When true, User-Content Attestation is required for byte-level corroboration.

requiresTimestamping.description: When true, external timestamping authority receipt is required.
